items.reviewerNotes: Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Legal nuance unclear: candidates disagree whether police may order drivers to leave/evacuate after property-damage collisions. Insufficient evidence to map to an existing qid or to choose True/False. Rejected top matcher: Top candidate (q0250) asserts police cannot order leave; conflicting candidates and legal nuance make automatic acceptance unsafe.

Codex ultra-strict approveExistingQid: ROW unique detail matches: After an accident that caused injuries, you must secure the scene and contact the police.. True/false polarity is Right; French key A (Yes) maps to that polarity.

Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Potential new question but local answer key is unknown; kept unresolved for human review. Rejected top matcher: Potential new question but local answer key is unknown; kept unresolved for human review.

Codex ultra-strict approveExistingQid: MCQ option rows align; French key B (more than 150m) maps to master B (beyond 150m). Prompt and option-row concepts were checked against qbank; answer key follows French order.

Codex ultra-strict approveExistingQid: Options reordered; French key A (you can't check for dark ditches, cracks, and holes) maps to master B (it is impossible to see the hidden holes and bumps and potholes on the road surface). Prompt and option-row concepts were checked against qbank; answer key follows French order.

Codex ultra-strict approveExistingQid: ROW unique detail matches: You must seriously control your speed, observe the surroundings, and ensure safety to move forward or make a U-turn.. True/false polarity is Right; French key A (Yes) maps to that polarity. Rejected top q0268: it is weaker on the strict prompt/option/detail comparison.

Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: ROW unique detail is 'other vehicle plate + forged registration certificate'. Candidate q0294/q0335/q0293 are only adjacent concepts (other vehicle plate/license or falsified plate/license), and the exact registration-certificate forgery detail is not safely represented. True/false answer is visible as Yes, but qid match would be a guess.

Codex ultra-strict approveExistingQid: MCQ option rows align; French key B (leave the highway as soon as possible) maps to master B (leave the highway as soon as possible). Prompt and option-row concepts were checked against qbank; answer key follows French order.

Codex ultra-strict approveExistingQid: ROW unique detail matches: driver may drive a very short distance after taking medication with psychoactive substances.. True/false polarity is Wrong; French key B (No) maps to that polarity.

Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Potential new question but local answer key is unknown; kept unresolved for human review. Rejected top matcher: Potential new question but local answer key is unknown; kept unresolved for human review.
